productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Festa Bright Green Shirt
description: CompositionGreen and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with two button cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab, yoked back, pocket with branding on left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash careMachine wash with like colours using a mild detergentWash and dry inside outDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron;Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt will give you a relaxed, easy-going air.
